steps.title: Follow the passage structure
steps.content: The passage opens by asking why rusty-spotted cats purr but jaguars roar. It then presents a hypothesis involving differences in the hyoid bone and related anatomy.

steps.title: Reject inaccurate structures
steps.content: A mentions habitats, which the passage does not discuss. B says the text presents facts that weaken a theory, but the facts support the hypothesis. D says the two species share a behavior, while the passage contrasts their behaviors. The structure is a question followed by a possible answer. The answer is C.
